biological_process: Pheromone trail decay after food removal or rain/washout.
current_proxy: literature_pheromone_constraints_v1 checks qualitative persistence effects only.
next_action: Digitize trail decay or trail occupancy time series and map model day to the paper's time axis.
required_data: time since food removal or washout; trail pheromone proxy or trail occupancy; species/arena conditions; replicate variance or confidence interval

biological_process: Food quality or concentration versus recruitment/trail-laying strength.
current_proxy: paper_conditions_v5 checks high-quality source bias qualitatively.
next_action: Digitize food-quality recruitment curves and add a concentration-to-quality mapping.
required_data: food concentration or quality; trail-laying event rate or recruitment count; time window; species and colony state

biological_process: Branch choice probability/time course under symmetric and biased trails.
current_proxy: calibrate_double_bridge.py fits a literature model reference, not raw biological counts.
next_action: Replace or supplement the model reference with digitized branch-choice curves from a real double-bridge experiment.
required_data: time or crossing index; branch choice probability; path length / bridge geometry; replicate count

biological_process: Trail density versus speed/flow under crowding.
next_action: Digitize speed-density or flow-density curves and fit contact/crowding parameters.
required_data: linear density; mean speed; flow or flux; trail geometry

biological_process: Temperature/humidity stress versus brood survival or development.
next_action: Digitize brood survival/development curves or collect lab data for the target species.
required_data: temperature and humidity; brood stage composition; survival or development rate; time horizon

biological_process: Queen founding reserves, egg laying and first worker emergence over time.
current_proxy: actual_biology_simulation.py has founding_colony viability smoke output only.
next_action: Select a target species and add founding-stage laboratory or literature count curves.
required_data: days since founding; egg/larva/pupa/worker counts; queen survival and reserve state; temperature and feeding regime
